name: Sravan Reddy
tagline: AI Developer | Hackathon Organizer | Python Developer
bio: Passionate about building AI tools and solving real-world problems. I create intelligent systems, organize hackathons, and build products that matter.

about.bio: I'm a passionate AI developer and startup builder who loves creating tools that solve real problems. With experience in Python, LLMs, and full-stack web development, I bridge the gap between cutting-edge AI research and practical applications.
about.goals: Building AI-powered startups that create positive impact at scale.
